DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF JANE DOE'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF DEFENDANT KARIM ZAIM IS GRANTED. NO GOOD CAUSE EXISTED FOR DEFENDANT TO FAIL TO APPEAR AT HIS DULY NOTICE DEPOSITION ON THE PREVIOUSLY AGREED UPON DATE. THE OBJECTIONS POSED DID NOT PRESENT A VALID BASIS TO FAIL TO APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION. THE OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION TO COMPEL LACKS SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION. THEREFORE, IF THE DEPOSITION HAS NOT ALREADY TAKEN PLACE, THEN IT IS ORDERED TO TAKE PLACE ON APRIL 17, AT THE TIME AND PLACE DESIGNATED BY PLAINTIFF UNLESS A DIFFERENT STARTING TIME ON APRIL 17 IS AGREED TO IN WRITING BY COUNSEL. SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,000.00 ORDER SIGNED. PROCEEDING'S REPORTED BY CAROL S. NYGARD CSR# 4018 TEL NO. 415.956.9400; JUDGE: DAVID M. HELLBRAUN; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY (D302).

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2018 Set For Trial On Jan-07-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Defendant Karim Zaim
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty Eileen M. Ahern of Willenken Wilson Loh & Delgado LLP tel no. 213.855.9240 appearing for the Plaintiff Jane Am Doe via CourtCall;
Atty Therese Y. Cannata and Aaron Field of Cannata O'Toole Fickes Almazan Law Firm tel no. 415.409.8900 appearing for Defendant Karim Zaim.

ARGUED - PLAINTIFF JANE DOE'S Motion To Compel Deposition Of Defendant Karim Zaim IS GRANTED. No good cause existed for defendant to fail to appear at his duly notice deposition on the previously agreed upon date. The Objections posed did not present a valid basis to fail to appear for deposition. The Opposition to the Motion to Compel lacks substantial justification. Therefore, if the deposition has not already taken place, then it is ordered to take place on April 17, at the time and place designated by plaintiff unless a different starting time on April 17 is agreed to in writing by counsel. Sanctions against plaintiff are awarded in the amount of $5,000.00 Proceeding's reported by Carol S. Nygard CSR# 4018 tel no. 415.956.9400; Judge: David M. Hellbraun; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (D302).
